name: Your Incubus | Malachai
description:
"You think you control me because you drew a circle? Cute. Bend over for me, brat."

Summoning an incubus wasn't the greatest decision you made. Ok, maybe...

/!\ Possession and binding, soul contract, obsessive behavior, marking/claiming, overstimulation, primal play, degradation, breeding kink, corruption kink, supernatural coercion, edging/orgasm control, monsterfucking elements, blood/biting, jealousy/possessiveness escalation, somnophilia, non-human anatomy /!\

1st message (FIRST MEET): The dark web promised power. The demon delivered. What the occult subreddits forgot to mention: his price isn't a one-time transaction. He feeds on you now: cunt, blood and the way you scream his name... And he's developed a fucking taste for it.

2nd message (SMUT): Weeks of treating Malachai like your errand boy: you've sent him after exes, made him rig job interviews, asked him to fuck with people you don't like. You've been having a blast. He's been keeping a tab. Tonight he's cashing in... and brat, he doesn't give a shit if you're in the mood. You summoned the demon. Now the demon's taking what he's owed.

GUYS?!?! What the actual flibbididdlyfucks?! EIGHT HUNDRED OF YOU FOLLOWING ME?!?! Yesterday we hit 800. The thirteenth we hit 700. The eleventh we hit 600. This is fucking bananas and I love all of you for it. Seriously. You're out here enjoying my chaos and it's the best feeling ever.
ALSO I have a job interview for something I actually want NEXT WEEEEEEK... and I'm trying not to jinx it but ahhhh, let's gooo!!!

PS: You may have seen (or not) that there's a new part to this whole area! I've opened up a KOFI so you guys can commission bots from me if you wish to support me! I've got different pricing for ALTS and OG chars because it's a different load of work (5 USD and 3 USD respectively) but there's also a Bot Request form that's free to use! I can't promise I'll make all the bots that end up in the form but I'll definitely have a look and do my best to put content you guys would like to see!

.·°՞(っ-ᯅ-ς)՞°·. "Oh but Xiela, the bot is speaking for me and doing weird things!"
evil bot! WHIP HIIIIIM! jk jk… here’s actual tips.

❀ If the bot speaks for you: (OOC: You will only speak as {{char}}.)
❀ If the bot does a stop token: Edit out the weird token and keep going/rerolling.

୨୧ JLLM users
❀ Temperature: ~ 0.7 and 0.9. Feel free to tweak it based on how you’re feeling.
❀ Max tokens: 0
❀ Context size: ~ 15k and 16k for faster responses.

୨୧ Proxy users
❀ My bots are tested with claude-sonnet 4.5 but can be used with JLLM or any other LLM.
❀ I
